perturbation.original_text: 1. License - Individual grants Lifeway together with its affiliates, subsidiaries, parent companies and their representatives and employees have an unlimited, perpetual, non-exclusive, worldwide and, except as set forth in Section 9, royalty-free, right to use, reuse, publish, reproduce, perform, copy, create derivative works, exhibit, broadcast, and display throughout the world the name, image and likeness of Individual in Marketing Materials (as defined below) in connection with marketing, advertising or otherwise promoting the Lifeway products and/or services and for historical reference and display purposes and other internal purposes, including without limitation, internal sales meetings.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. License - Individual grants Lifeway together with its affiliates, subsidiaries, parent companies and their representatives and employees have an unlimited, non-exclusive, worldwide and, except as set forth in Section 9, royalty-free, right to use, reuse, publish, reproduce, perform, copy, create derivative works, exhibit, broadcast, and display throughout the world the name, image and likeness of Individual in Marketing Materials (as defined below) in connection with marketing, advertising or otherwise promoting the Lifeway products and/or services and for historical reference and display purposes and other internal purposes, including without limitation, internal sales meetings.
perturbation.explanation: The term 'perpetual' was removed from the License agreement in Section 1, contradicting Section 16, where the agreement is stated to extend beyond termination.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 16. Survival - Unless and to the extent otherwise specified herein, all terms of this Agreement which by their nature extend beyond its termination, remain in effect until fulfilled, and apply to respective successors and assigns.
perturbation.justification: The removal of the term 'perpetual' from the license grant in Section 1 directly contradicts Section 16, which states that terms of the agreement that extend beyond termination remain in effect. By removing 'perpetual' the agreement implies that the license does not necessarily extend beyond termination. This creates a direct conflict, as Section 16 assumes that some terms, including the license, are intended to survive the agreement's termination, rendering the agreement inconsistent and potentially unenforceable as it relates to rights post-termination.

perturbation.original_text: 2. Marketing Materials - Marketing Materials shall mean those marketing, sales, advertising, publicity and promotional materials produced by Lifeway or produced on Lifeway's behalf that contain Individual's biographical materials, name, nickname, likeness, voice, photograph, signature or facsimile thereof, reviews, endorsements, testimonials, demonstrations, depictions of the same, or other identifying personal characteristics made in any and all forms of media, that reflect the personal opinions and views of the Individual in connection with Lifeway products and/or services in whatever medium whether now known or hereafter created including, without limitation, websites, intranets, social media, radio and television commercials, video and audio tapes, digitally formatted computer media including but not limited to internet and CD-ROMs, product labels, product packaging, point-of-purchase materials, trade, direct mail, magazines, newspapers, coupons, free standing inserts, and posters.
perturbation.changed_text: 2. Marketing Materials - Marketing Materials shall mean those marketing, sales, advertising, publicity and promotional materials produced by Lifeway or produced on Lifeway's behalf that contain Individual's biographical materials, name, nickname, likeness, voice, photograph, signature or facsimile thereof, reviews, endorsements, testimonials, demonstrations, depictions of the same, or other identifying personal characteristics made in digital forms of media only, that reflect the personal opinions and views of the Individual in connection with Lifeway products and/or services in whatever medium whether now known or hereafter created including, without limitation, websites, intranets, social media.
perturbation.explanation: The change in Section 2, limiting Marketing Materials to only digital formats, creates a contradiction with Section 1 where Lifeway is granted a worldwide right to use the likeness of the individual in connection with marketing materials, where this section contains no digital-only limitation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. License - Individual grants Lifeway together with its affiliates, subsidiaries, parent companies and their representatives and employees have an unlimited, perpetual, non-exclusive, worldwide and, except as set forth in Section 9, royalty-free, right to use, reuse, publish, reproduce, perform, copy, create derivative works, exhibit, broadcast, and display throughout the world the name, image and likeness of Individual in Marketing Materials (as defined below) in connection with marketing, advertising or otherwise promoting the Lifeway products and/or services and for historical reference and display purposes and other internal purposes, including without limitation, internal sales meetings.
perturbation.justification: The change in Section 2 limits the definition of "Marketing Materials" to digital forms of media only. However, Section 1 grants Lifeway the right to use the individual's likeness in "Marketing Materials" without any limitation to digital formats. This creates a contradiction because Section 1 now encompasses a broader range of materials than the revised definition in Section 2 allows, leading to ambiguity in enforcement.
